data.name: Error.BrandSub
data.value: There was an issue with your account. Please check and try logging in again.

data.name: Error.Sub
data.value: We couldn't complete the third-party login verification. This is likely due to an authorization timeout or lost session between tabs — your account is safe.

data.name: Error.Callout
data.value: Please completely close your browser, reopen it, and try logging in again. This clears any residual login state and usually resolves the issue.
